title: Sentinel Shield production-readiness report
description: The machine-readable record emitted by `scripts/run-production-readiness.sh run` and independently re-verified by its `review` mode. It records the identity of the source under test (commit / default branch / event / workflow), the changed-file inventory, the per-gate verdicts, the compatibility / adopter / security / scanner / artifact / limitations evidence, and the version recommendation. The report is UNTRUSTED input to `review`: `review` re-derives every trust decision and FAILS CLOSED when any field is missing, malformed, stale, ambiguous, or does not match the caller's independent expectations. Engine-only scope: framework live-validation is never claimed by this report. Contains NO secrets, tokens, or repo-local absolute paths.

schema_version.description: Only "1" is supported; consumers fail closed otherwise.

generated_at.description: UTC generation timestamp. `review` rejects a report older than --max-age-seconds (stale) or dated in the future (fail closed).

title.description: Human title. MUST state engine-only scope until the framework tracks are independently validated; `review` fails closed if 'engine-only' is absent.

release_scope.description: Governance track. Only 'engine-only' is recommendable to GA (v2.0.0) by this harness.

source.description: Identity of the code under test. `review` matches every field against independent --expected-* expectations.

commit.description: The source commit. 'unknown' is a structure-only placeholder that NEVER satisfies review.

default_branch.description: Default branch the source commit must belong to (typically 'master').

event.description: CI event. Only push/workflow_dispatch is release proof; pull_request is never accepted by review.

changed_files.description: Inventory of files changed relative to the merge base. Drives test-applicability review.

gates.description: Per-gate verdicts. A required gate that is 'fail', 'timeout', or 'skipped' blocks readiness.

compatibility.description: Compatibility-matrix coverage. `review` requires complete==true and an empty missing[].

adopter.description: Adopter scorecard summary. `review` requires result=='pass' and score>=--min-adopter-score.

accepted.description: Production security acceptance decision (no unresolved critical/high, no expired waivers).

scanners.description: Scanner health. `review` fails closed on any scanner-error/parser-error.

artifacts.description: Published/verified artifacts. `review` requires ownership_ok==true and a 64-hex sha256 for each.

limitations.description: Published limitations. `review` requires documented==true and framework_live_validation==false.

evidence.description: Release-evidence completeness used by the version-decision helper.

default_branch_ci.description: A successful push/workflow_dispatch engine CI run on the source commit is present.

evidence_complete.description: The full release-evidence + manifest reproducibility bundle is present and green.

soak_complete.description: The required soak/observation window has elapsed with no regression.

tag_policy.description: Tag-target policy assertion. `review` fails closed if destructive tag operations were performed.

version.description: beta.3 = material blockers remain; rc.1 = behavior complete, soak/evidence remains; 2.0.0 = all engine-only GA criteria pass.
